manifest.name: Dutch Female Passenger (Index Case)
manifest.notes: Confirmed hantavirus. Boarded SHN symptomatic; deteriorated in-flight; died upon arrival at JNB ER. Seat unconfirmed.

flights.notes: WHO is actively tracing all 82 passengers and 6 crew aboard this flight. Index case (PEDB43) boarded at Saint Helena with gastrointestinal symptoms on April 24; condition deteriorated in-flight and she died upon arrival at the Johannesburg ER, testing positive for hantavirus. South African authorities instructed Airlink to notify all passengers to contact the health department.
